title: cephaelis faguetii
intro: Cephaelis faguetii, also known as the Guatemalan feverbark, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antipyretic agent, helping to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Cephaelis faguetii include its ability to aid in the treatment of various ailments, such as fever, headache, and sore throat, as well as its potential to exhibit antimicrobial properties. Cephaelis faguetii can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
